profile.name: Nevil Amraniya
profile.tagline: ML-focused Computer Science student building data-driven products with Python, statistics, and modern web tooling.
profile.aboutText: I'm an ML-focused Computer Science student interested in applied machine learning, analytics, and intelligent product design. I enjoy turning ambiguous problems into structured datasets, experiments, and user-facing tools. Right now I'm building projects around real-time systems, forecasting ideas, and data-driven decision making while looking for internships where I can contribute across data preparation, model development, evaluation, and deployment.

education.degree: BSc in Computer Science and Digital Technologies

certifications.title: Programming for Everybody (Getting Started with Python)

currentProject.title: QLess
currentProject.tagline: Queue management platform for reducing customer wait-time uncertainty.
currentProject.description: QLess is a real-time queue management system aimed at improving customer flow, reducing manual coordination, and making wait-time communication more transparent.
currentProject.problem: Physical queues create poor customer visibility and inconsistent staff-side scheduling.
currentProject.model: Current version focuses on scheduling logic and real-time updates. Forecasting-based queue prediction is planned as next iteration.

projects.title: QLess
projects.tagline: Real-time queue coordination product with room for predictive scheduling.
projects.description: Built to reduce customer confusion around wait times and improve service coordination through live updates and structured queue logic.
projects.problem: Customers and staff both suffer when queue status is opaque and manual.
projects.model: Rule-based scheduling and event-driven updates today; demand prediction module planned for future ML extension.

projects.title: Weather-App
projects.tagline: Forecast visualization app focused on clean presentation of external data.
projects.description: Weather application that turns raw forecast API responses into a readable interface with quick location-based lookup.
projects.problem: Raw weather data is noisy for end users without clean filtering and presentation.
projects.model: No ML model in current version; project focuses on external data ingestion, UI clarity, and frontend data handling.
